Name: Herald of the Hosts
Effect: On enter: Draw 'Hildebrand, the Old' or 'Hadubrand, the Young' from your deck.
Anecdote: 'I heard it said that two chosen warriors, Hildebrand and Hadubrand, met alone between two armies.'

Name: Hunnish Bowmen
Anecdote: 'He fled eastward with Dietrich, away from Odoacer's hatred, and thirty years he rode in the host of the Huns.'

Name: Ute, the Waiting Wife
Effect: On enter: Return a human from your underworld to your hand.
Anecdote: 'He left a young wife weeping in the homeland, and a child without inheritance, and rode east.'

Name: Shield-Bearer of Bern
Effect: On enter: The next hero you play this turn costs [1] less.
Anecdote: 'He carried his lord's linden shield to the mustering-field and asked no questions.'

Name: Golden Arm-Rings
Effect: On enter: Gift this card to an opponent. While on top: 'While on top' and 'Once per turn' abilities of the owner's other cards here are inactive.
Anecdote: 'He wound from his arm the twisted rings the king of the Huns had given him: Take this, with good will. — With the spear a man receives gifts, said the son, point against point.'

Name: Old Chronicler
Anecdote: 'Ik gihorta dat seggen — I heard it told. That is all that remains: sixty-eight lines, and the ending lost.'

Name: Rider from the East
Effect: On enter: You may move one of your beings to this location.
Anecdote: 'Always at the head of the host he rode, and battle was ever too dear to him. Known he was to all bold men.'

Name: Suspicious Retainer
Effect: On enter: Choose an opponent. They reveal their hand.
Anecdote: 'You are an old Hun, endlessly cunning. Seafarers told me: Hildebrand is dead. — He would not believe the man standing before him.'

Name: Hadubrand, the Young
Effect: While on top: Hadubrand has +2 Power while an enemy hero is at this location.
Anecdote: 'You shall not take me with gifts, old Hun. You will not find me a coward.'

Name: Band of Exiles
Anecdote: 'Friendless men who fled the hatred of Odoacer rode east with nothing but their war-gear.'

Name: Dietrich of Bern
Effect: While on top: Your heroes at this location cannot be destroyed by enemy card effects.
Anecdote: 'With Dietrich he fled, and with Dietrich he returned; the old man had lost neither loyalty nor lord.'

Name: Odoacer, the Usurper
Effect: On enter: For each opponent, you may move one of their beings at this location to another location.
Anecdote: 'The hatred of Odoacer drove the best men from the land. What a king cannot rule, he scatters.'

Name: The Duelling-Ground
Effect: While on top: Each side counts only its strongest being's power at this location.
Anecdote: 'Between the two hosts a space was left, and the two champions rode into it alone. The armies grounded their spears to watch.'

Name: Hildebrand, the Old
Effect: On enter: For each opponent, destroy their topmost being at this location if its power is less than Hildebrand's.
Anecdote: 'Woe now, ruling God, a woeful fate is at work! Sixty summers and winters I wandered — and now my own child shall strike me with the sword, or I be his slayer.'

Name: Champion of the Goths
Anecdote: 'Let him who dares now win the war-gear of the man who falls. — Then they let the ash-spears fly, and hewed the white shields until the linden-wood grew small.'
